description.LOCATION_EN: Castle Peak Road - Castle Peak Bay
description.LOCATION_CN: 青山公路　–　青山灣段

2024-04-14T17:42:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Castle Peak Road - Castle Peak Bay (both bounds) near Hong Kong Gold Coast are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-14T17:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，青山公路　–　青山灣段(來回方向)近香港黃金海岸的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-14T17:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Castle Peak Road - Castle Peak Bay (both bounds) near Hong Kong Gold Coast which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-14T17:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青山公路　–　青山灣段(來回方向)近香港黃金海岸的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-14T18:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , tunnel tube of Scenic Hill Tunnel (Zhuhai bound) is closed to all traffic.
2024-04-14T18:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，觀景山隧道(往珠海方向)的管道現已封閉。

2024-04-14T18:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Scenic Hill Tunnel.
2024-04-14T18:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，觀景山隧道現已實施單線雙程行車措施。

2024-04-14T20:42:00.CONTENT_EN: The one-tube-two-way traffic arrangement which was implemented on Scenic Hill Tunnel (Hong Kong bound) due to vehicle on fire is now cancelled.
2024-04-14T20:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛着火而於觀景山隧道(香港方向)實施的單管雙程行車措施現已取消。

2024-04-14T20:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the tunnel tube slow lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Sha Tin bound) is closed to all traffic. Only the fast lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-14T20:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，獅子山隧道(往沙田方向)的管道慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用快線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-14T20:54:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube slow lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Sha Tin bound) which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-14T20:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的獅子山隧道(往沙田方向)的管道慢線現已解封。

2024-04-15T02:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the slow lane of Tai Po Road (Cheung Sha Wan bound) near Shek Kip Mei Street is closed to all traffic. Only the fast lane is available to motorists.
2024-04-15T02:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，大埔道(往長沙灣方向)近石硤尾街的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用快線行車。
